reviews.comment:
Van dos veces que no tienen nafta. La remodelaron hace poco. Nunca tienen habilitados todos los surtidores. Es lenta. Siempre hay cola (la ypf es la nafta más barata).

(Translated by Google)
They've run out of gas twice now. It was recently remodeled. They never have all the pumps open. It's slow. There's always a line (YPF is the cheapest gas).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcTdHLXFBRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Enrique Norberto Freitas Ascenção Sánchez Montero

reviews.comment:
Cuidado si ponen aire en los neumáticos porque algún bestia te puede romper la válvula y se te va desinflando de a poco.

(Translated by Google)
Be careful when putting air in your tires because some idiot might break the valve and it will slowly deflate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1eDRtd2JREAE

reviews.comment:
45 minutos esperando para que te carguen nafta, 2 surtidores habilitados y una persona que agilidad es lo que le falta. No funcionaba la app.

(Translated by Google)
I waited 45 minutes for gas, there were only two pumps open, and the attendant was incredibly slow. The app wasn't working.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1Z2VDUktBEAE

Evidentemente al de la concesión le importa muy poco como son sus empleados, el debe ser igual maleducado, pocas ganas de trabajar y autoritario. Un desastre!!!!
